args.query:
SELECT Symbol, "Company Description" AS company_name
FROM stockinfo
WHERE "Listing Exchange" = 'N'
  AND (ETF IS NULL OR ETF <> 'Y')
  AND ("Test Issue" IS NULL OR "Test Issue" <> 'Y');

  SELECT si.Symbol
  FROM stockinfo_database.stockinfo si
  JOIN information_schema.tables t
    ON t.table_schema='main' AND t.table_name = si.Symbol
  WHERE si."Listing Exchange"='N'
    AND (si.ETF IS NULL OR si.ETF <> 'Y')
    AND (si."Test Issue" IS NULL OR si."Test Issue" <> 'Y')
), daily AS (
  SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT Symbol,
           SUM(CASE WHEN Close>Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
           SUM(CASE WHEN Close<Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days
    FROM (
      SELECT s.Symbol, p.Open, p.Close
      FROM sym s
      JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT Open, Close
        FROM query_table(s.Symbol)
        WHERE Date >= '2017-01-01' AND Date <= '2017-12-31'
      ) p ON TRUE
    ) x
    GROUP BY Symbol
  )
)

), sym2 AS (
  SELECT s.Symbol, s.company_name
  FROM sym s
  JOIN information_schema.tables t
    ON t.table_schema='main' AND t.table_name = s.Symbol
), sym3 AS (
  SELECT sym2.Symbol, sym2.company_name
  FROM sym2
  JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT MIN(Date) AS min_date, MAX(Date) AS max_date
    FROM (SELECT Date FROM query_table(sym2.Symbol))
  ) d ON TRUE
  WHERE d.min_date <= '2017-12-31' AND d.max_date >= '2017-01-01'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sym3;
